findings.thai: วันนี้เหนื่อย

findings.thai: วันนี้อากาศดี
findings.reason: The syllable 'กาศ' (kaat) has a mid-class initial consonant, long vowel, and dead ending, which results in a low tone, not high.
The word 'สาย' (saai) has a high-class initial consonant and a live ending, which results in a rising tone, not mid.
